event_world_42_20260423_084312_0000.name: Beach Volleyball Open
event_world_42_20260423_084312_0000.description: Elite beach volleyball teams from across the region compete on courts set up right on the waterfront — free entry for spectators.

reviews.text: Decent event overall though the merchandise stall ran out of programmes by midday.
Average experience — neither the worst nor the best event I have attended this year.

Overpriced for what was essentially a community fair dressed up as a premium event.
The concept was interesting but execution felt rushed and under-rehearsed.
Accessible entrances were well signed and staff were genuinely helpful to our group member using a wheelchair.

reviews.text: Decent event overall though the merchandise stall ran out of programmes by midday.

event_world_42_20260423_084312_0004.name: World Street Food Carnival

reviews.text: Perfectly sized event — big enough to have scale but small enough to feel personal and accessible.

reviews.text: Performers were 90 minutes late and the cancellation announcement came via a single tweet.
